channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: First Officer Warned United Pilot He Was 'Slow and a Little Low' Before Light Pole Strike, NTSB Says
item.description: The NTSB released a preliminary report on a United Airlines plane that hit a light pole on the New Jersey Turnpike.

item.title: Appeals court to hear arguments on whether Trump's ballroom plans may proceed
item.description: Three appellate judges will hear arguments on whether construction for President Trump's White House ballroom plans should continue.

item.title: Senate passes reconciliation bill funding ICE for three years, without DOJ fund ban
item.description: Senate Republicans passed funding for DHS immigration enforcement agencies after a vote-a-rama, excluding a DOJ fund ban.

item.title: Israel-Hezbollah fighting clouds prospects for U.S.-Iran peace deal
item.description: It remains unclear how close the U.S. and Iran are to a deal ending the Iran war amid ongoing Israel-Hezbollah hostilities.
